descriptions.agro: VerdaAgro combines precision engineering with biological insights. Maximize yields with autonomous drone fleets and IoT sensor networks.
descriptions.military: Military-grade UAV systems designed for high-stakes reconnaissance and strategic superiority. Swiss-engineered reliability for global defense.
descriptions.firefighting: Next-generation firefighting drones with advanced thermal optics. Rapid deployment in high-temperature environments to save lives and forests.
descriptions.solar: Autonomous drone solutions for efficient solar panel cleaning and inspection, maximizing energy output and extending asset life.
descriptions.cranes: Specialized UAV support for Liebherr crane operations in extreme winter conditions, ensuring safety and precision.
descriptions.wind: Advanced drone systems for wind turbine installation and maintenance, reducing downtime and operational costs.

agro.title: Smart Farming for a Changing Planet

cards.title: Precision Crop Management
cards.desc: Autonomous drone fleets equipped with multispectral sensors for real-time crop health analysis and targeted treatment application.

cards.title: Soil & Yield Analytics
cards.desc: Deep sensor integration to monitor nutrient levels, moisture, and predict optimal harvest windows across your entire estate.

cards.title: Eco-Friendly Application
cards.desc: Reduce chemical waste by up to 40% with targeted drone spraying technology that protects biodiversity.

cards.title: Stealth Surveillance
cards.desc: Low-observable UAV designs for reconnaissance in contested airspace with minimal radar footprint.

cards.title: Secure Communications
cards.desc: Resilient encrypted data links designed to maintain communication under heavy electronic jamming.

cards.title: Border Monitoring
cards.desc: Autonomous 24/7 perimeter monitoring with AI-driven anomaly detection and alert systems.

cards.title: Thermal Hotspot Detection
cards.desc: Real-time thermal mapping for forest and structure fire containment with AI-powered hotspot prediction.

cards.title: Precision Suppression
cards.desc: Autonomous delivery of high-volume fire retardant material directly to hotspots with minimal collateral impact.

cards.title: Search & Rescue
cards.desc: Dual spectral sensors to find missing persons through smoke and dense environmental debris.

cards.title: Automated Panel Cleaning
cards.desc: Drone-mounted cleaning systems that remove dust and debris from solar arrays without water waste or manual labor.

cards.title: Thermal Performance Scan
cards.desc: Infrared scanning to detect underperforming cells, hotspots, and electrical faults across large solar farms.

cards.title: Predictive Maintenance
cards.desc: AI-driven scheduling based on weather patterns and soiling rates to optimize cleaning cycles and energy yield.

cards.title: Icing Detection
cards.desc: UAV-based inspection of crane booms and cables for ice buildup that could compromise structural integrity.

cards.title: Cold Weather Surveys
cards.desc: Rapid site assessments in snow and low-visibility conditions to ensure safe lifting operations.

cards.title: Equipment Monitoring
cards.desc: Thermal and visual checks on hydraulics and engines to prevent cold-weather failures before they happen.

cards.title: Blade Inspection
cards.desc: High-resolution imaging and LiDAR scanning to detect cracks, erosion, and lightning damage on turbine blades.

cards.title: Installation Support
cards.desc: Precision drone surveys and payload delivery to assist technicians during turbine assembly and commissioning.

cards.title: Offshore Logistics
cards.desc: Autonomous supply runs and inspection flights for offshore wind farms in challenging maritime conditions.

history.title: History
history.label: Our History
history.timelineDesc: Seven years of building, testing, and deploying unmanned systems — culminating in the creation of Rotarius.
history.philosophyDesc1: At Rotarius, our philosophy is building a comprehensive UAV ecosystem — not just a standalone product. In a fast-moving industry like unmanned systems, production lines and finished goods alone are not enough.
history.philosophyDesc2: An ecosystem means the full creation cycle exists under one roof. Every stage depends on every other — only by managing all processes together can we deliver the results our clients expect.
history.ecosystemDesc: Every department is interconnected — from R&D to pilot training to field service. One ecosystem, one standard.
history.componentsDesc: We don't just assemble drones — we manufacture the critical components that make them work. This vertical integration gives us full control over quality, performance, and supply chain reliability.
